decoder.c(3) Library Functions Manual decoder.c(3)

NAME

decoder.c - FFmpeg HEVC decoder for ASCII art frames.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct h265_decoder

Typedefs


typedef struct h265_decoder h265_decoder_t

Functions


h265_decoder_t * h265_decoder_create (void)
void h265_decoder_destroy (h265_decoder_t *decoder)
asciichat_error_t h265_decode (h265_decoder_t *decoder, const uint8_t *encoded_packet, size_t packet_size, uint16_t *output_width, uint16_t *output_height, uint8_t *output_buf, size_t *output_size)
void h265_decoder_get_stats (h265_decoder_t *decoder, uint64_t *total_frames, uint64_t *keyframes, uint16_t *last_width, uint16_t *last_height)

Detailed Description

FFmpeg HEVC decoder for ASCII art frames.

Definition in file decoder.c.

Typedef Documentation

typedef struct h265_decoder h265_decoder_t

Function Documentation

asciichat_error_t h265_decode (h265_decoder_t * decoder, const uint8_t * encoded_packet, size_t packet_size, uint16_t * output_width, uint16_t * output_height, uint8_t * output_buf, size_t * output_size)

Definition at line 107 of file decoder.c.

115   {
116     if (!decoder || !encoded_packet || !output_width || !output_height || !output_buf || !output_size) {
117         return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INTERNAL, "Invalid decoder arguments");
118     }
119 
120     if (packet_size < 5) {
121         return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, "Packet too small (minimum 5 bytes)");
122     }
123 
124     // Parse header
125     uint8_t flags = encoded_packet[0];
126     uint16_t width = ((uint16_t)encoded_packet[1] << 8) | encoded_packet[2];
127     uint16_t height = ((uint16_t)encoded_packet[3] << 8) | encoded_packet[4];
128 
129     if (width == 0 || height == 0) {
130         return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_PROTOCOL, "Invalid frame dimensions: %ux%u", width, height);
131     }
132 
133     size_t required_output = width * height;
134     if (*output_size < required_output) {
135         *output_size = required_output;
136         return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_NETWORK_SIZE, "Output buffer too small: need %zu, have %zu",
137                         required_output, *output_size);
138     }
139 
140     // Decode HEVC data
141     if (packet_size > 5) {
142         const uint8_t *hevc_data = encoded_packet + 5;
143         size_t hevc_size = packet_size - 5;
144 
145         // Send packet to decoder
146         av_packet_from_data(decoder->packet, (uint8_t *)hevc_data, hevc_size);
147 
148         if (avcodec_send_packet(decoder->codec_ctx, decoder->packet) < 0) {
149             return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_DECODE, "Failed to send packet to decoder");
150         }
151 
152         if (avcodec_receive_frame(decoder->codec_ctx, decoder->frame) < 0) {
153             return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_DECODE, "Failed to receive decoded frame");
154         }
155     } else {
156         // Empty packet - just signal a frame boundary
157         if (avcodec_send_packet(decoder->codec_ctx, NULL) < 0) {
158             return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_DECODE, "Failed to flush decoder");
159         }
160     }
161 
162     // Extract Y plane (grayscale intensity)
163     uint8_t *y_plane = decoder->frame->data[0];
164     int y_stride = decoder->frame->linesize[0];
165     int img_width = decoder->frame->width;
166     int img_height = decoder->frame->height;
167 
168     if (img_width != (int)width || img_height != (int)height) {
169         log_warn("Image dimensions mismatch: expected %ux%u, got %dx%d", width, height, img_width, img_height);
170     }
171 
172     // Copy Y plane to output (ASCII intensity values)
173     for (int y = 0; y < img_height && y < (int)height; y++) {
174         memcpy(output_buf + y * width, y_plane + y * y_stride, width);
175     }
176 
177     *output_width = width;
178     *output_height = height;
179     *output_size = width * height;
180 
181     decoder->last_width = width;
182     decoder->last_height = height;
183     decoder->total_frames++;
184 
185     if (flags & H265_DECODER_FLAG_KEYFRAME) {
186         decoder->keyframes++;
187     }
188 
189     return ASCIICHAT_OK;
190 }




References h265_decoder::codec_ctx,
    h265_decoder::frame, h265_decoder::keyframes,
    h265_decoder::last_height, h265_decoder::last_width,
    log_warn, h265_decoder::packet, SET_ERRNO, and
    h265_decoder::total_frames.


Referenced by h265_server_decode_and_convert().






h265_decoder_t * h265_decoder_create (void )


Definition at line 31 of file decoder.c.


31                                           {
32     h265_decoder_t *dec = SAFE_CALLOC(1, sizeof(h265_decoder_t), h265_decoder_t *);
33     if (!dec) {
34         SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate decoder structure");
35         return NULL;
36     }
37 
38     // Find HEVC decoder
39     const AVCodec *codec = avcodec_find_decoder(AV_CODEC_ID_HEVC);
40     if (!codec) {
41         SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_INIT, "HEVC decoder not found");
42         SAFE_FREE(dec);
43         return NULL;
44     }
45 
46     dec->codec_ctx = avcodec_alloc_context3(codec);
47     if (!dec->codec_ctx) {
48         SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate codec context");
49         SAFE_FREE(dec);
50         return NULL;
51     }
52 
53     // Open decoder (capture x265 library output during initialization)
54     int codec_open_result = 0;
55     LOG_IO("hevc", {
56         codec_open_result = avcodec_open2(dec->codec_ctx, codec, NULL);
57     });
58 
59     if (codec_open_result < 0) {
60         SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_INIT, "Failed to open HEVC decoder");
61         avcodec_free_context(&dec->codec_ctx);
62         SAFE_FREE(dec);
63         return NULL;
64     }
65 
66     // Allocate frame and packet
67     dec->frame = av_frame_alloc();
68     dec->packet = av_packet_alloc();
69     dec->parser = av_parser_init(AV_CODEC_ID_HEVC);
70 
71     if (!dec->frame || !dec->packet || !dec->parser) {
72         SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate frame/packet/parser");
73         if (dec->frame) av_frame_free(&dec->frame);
74         if (dec->packet) av_packet_free(&dec->packet);
75         if (dec->parser) av_parser_close(dec->parser);
76         avcodec_free_context(&dec->codec_ctx);
77         SAFE_FREE(dec);
78         return NULL;
79     }
80 
81     log_info("FFmpeg HEVC decoder created");
82 
83     // Register decoder for debugging
84     NAMED_REGISTER_H265_DECODER(dec, "h265_decoder", NULL);
85 
86     return dec;
87 }

    h265_decoder::frame, h265_decoder::packet,
    h265_decoder::parser, SAFE_FREE, and SET_ERRNO.

  h265_decoder_destroy (h265_decoder_t * decoder)

90     if (!decoder) return;
91 
92     if (decoder->frame) {
93         av_frame_free(&decoder->frame);
94     }

97     }

100     }
101     if (decoder->codec_ctx) {
102         avcodec_free_context(&decoder->codec_ctx);
103     }
